---
name: Test
about: Adding or updating tests (test:)
---

## Summary

<!-- What behavior is covered or what gap is closed? -->

## Commits

Use **`test:`** or **`test(scope):`**, e.g. `test: cover PDF export edge case`.

## Checklist

- [ ] New or updated tests fail without the change and pass with it
- [ ] CI-relevant commands documented or obvious for reviewers
